info.title: Ship Platform API
info.description: Public Platform API (v1) — OAuth 2.0 Authorization Code + PKCE with scopes. See the README for the token quickstart.

bearerAuth.description: OAuth 2.0 access token obtained via Authorization Code + PKCE. Send as `Authorization: Bearer <token>`.

get.summary: Get the authenticated user and current workspace
get.description: Auth-only: requires a valid access token but **no scope**.
Requires scope `documents:read` (the broadest read scope). Returns any user-facing document_type; backing-store types are excluded. Paginated via an opaque `next_cursor`.
Requires scope `documents:read`.
Requires `wiki:read` or broad superscope `documents:read`. Returns only rows backed by document_type=`wiki`.

post.description: Requires `wiki:write` or broad superscope `documents:write`. The route fixes document_type to `wiki`; clients do not send document_type.

get.description: Requires `wiki:read` or broad superscope `documents:read`.
Requires `issues:read` or broad superscope `documents:read`. Returns only rows backed by document_type=`issue`.

post.description: Requires `issues:write` or broad superscope `documents:write`. The route fixes document_type to `issue`; clients do not send document_type.

get.description: Requires `issues:read` or broad superscope `documents:read`.
Requires `programs:read` or broad superscope `documents:read`. Returns only rows backed by document_type=`program`.

post.description: Requires `programs:write` or broad superscope `documents:write`. The route fixes document_type to `program`; clients do not send document_type.

get.description: Requires `programs:read` or broad superscope `documents:read`.
Requires `projects:read` or broad superscope `documents:read`. Returns only rows backed by document_type=`project`.

post.description: Requires `projects:write` or broad superscope `documents:write`. The route fixes document_type to `project`; clients do not send document_type.

get.description: Requires `projects:read` or broad superscope `documents:read`.
Requires `sprints:read` or broad superscope `documents:read`. Returns only rows backed by document_type=`sprint`.

post.description: Requires `sprints:write` or broad superscope `documents:write`. The route fixes document_type to `sprint`; clients do not send document_type.

get.description: Requires `sprints:read` or broad superscope `documents:read`.
Requires `people:read` or broad superscope `documents:read`. Returns only rows backed by document_type=`person`.

200.description: A page of people directory entries.

post.description: Requires `people:write` or broad superscope `documents:write`. The route fixes document_type to `person`; clients do not send document_type.

get.description: Requires `people:read` or broad superscope `documents:read`.
Requires `weekly_plans:read` or broad superscope `documents:read`. Returns only rows backed by document_type=`weekly_plan`.

post.description: Requires `weekly_plans:write` or broad superscope `documents:write`. The route fixes document_type to `weekly_plan`; clients do not send document_type.

get.description: Requires `weekly_plans:read` or broad superscope `documents:read`.
Requires `weekly_retros:read` or broad superscope `documents:read`. Returns only rows backed by document_type=`weekly_retro`.

get.description: Requires `weekly_retros:read` or broad superscope `documents:read`.
Requires `standups:read` or broad superscope `documents:read`. Returns only rows backed by document_type=`standup`.

get.description: Requires `standups:read` or broad superscope `documents:read`.
Requires `weekly_reviews:read` or broad superscope `documents:read`. Returns only rows backed by document_type=`weekly_review`.

get.description: Requires `weekly_reviews:read` or broad superscope `documents:read`.
